meta.title: Innovative CIP Security Training
meta.description: This is a 5 minute edited clip from a longer S4x17 session that show how Arizona Public service went from 4% engaged in traditional training to 83% engaged in this online story-based training. You get to see some of the impressive examples in this 5 minute clip.
